about.title: About Me
paragraphs: I am a passionate Full-Stack Web Developer. My journey is rooted in a deep fascination with how technology can solve complex business problems while providing seamless, beautiful user experiences.

Currently pursuing my BS in Software Engineering, I am constantly expanding my theoretical knowledge and applying it to real-world, highly scalable applications. My focus allows me to bridge the gap between  enterprise solutions and modern, agile web ecosystems (React, Node, Flask).
Whether I'm architecting a robust PostgreSQL database, integrating complex APIs, or fine-tuning Framer Motion animations for a stunning UI, I treat every line of code as an opportunity to innovate.

hobby.title: Beyond the Code
hobby.description: When I'm not developing or designing apps, I compete at an elite level in esports, and also I mentor my friends and juniors to get better at the programming and development fields.

items.name: JavaScript
items.description: Building dynamic, interactive logic and seamless user experiences for the modern web.

items.name: React
items.description: Developing complex, component-driven applications with fluid state management and Framer Motion.

items.name: Node.js
items.description: Creating scalable, event-driven backend services and robust server-side logic.

items.name: (SPFx)

items.description: Routing and middleware integration for creating fast, secure RESTful APIs.

items.name: Strapi
items.description: Managing dynamic content and data architectures via headless CMS integration.

items.name: Python
items.description: Writing clean, efficient scripts for automation, data processing, and foundational backend logic.

items.name: PostgreSQL
items.description: Designing robust, relational database schemas for dynamic e-commerce web platforms.

items.title: Frontend Intern
items.description: At Technomites, I honed my skills as a Frontend Developer. My primary focus was on enhancing user interfaces, developing interactive animations, effects and improve my work speed. I learned a lot about teamwork and collaboration. While also learning new skills like: Angular.ts, React.js, TailwindCSS and Bootstrap

items.title: Junior MERN-Stack Developer
items.description: I began my journey as a MERN stack Developer at TekScrum, where I was immersed in the world of full-stack development. My role involved working with MongoDB, Express.js, Next.js, Node.js, SAPUI5, SAP Fiori allowing me to gain hands-on experience in building modern web applications from the ground up.

items.title: Junior Full-Stack Developer
items.description: Working on real client-based projects, I am gaining hands-on experience in developing scalable and maintainable web applications. My responsibilities include building responsive user interfaces, implementing backend logic, and working with databases to deliver high-quality software solutions.

contact.description: I'm currently open to new opportunities in full-stack development. Let's build something amazing together.
